narrative:
Green Township has 2,021 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
